name: The Links at Woodridge
about: The Links at Woodridge is an 18-hole links-style golf course in Mineral Wells, WV. It features a par-71 layout spanning 6,830 yards with multiple tee boxes, designed by John Sayers. The facility offers a 2-tier driving range, a pro shop, a snack bar, and indoor golf simulators with over 100 courses available for booking. It is frequently used for outings, tournaments, and hosts events in a banquet hall that accommodates up to 300 guests.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golf simulators with over 100 courses available
A 2-tier driving range for practice sessions
Frequently hosts tournaments and outings for groups
Multiple tee boxes to accommodate all skill levels
Event venue options for golf-centric gatherings

simulator_hardware.notes: Simulator hardware brand and model are not specified on the website

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but club rentals are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a snack bar on-site. There is no mention of outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior golf rates and is frequently used for family events and functions.
